subject: Bellsprout, the Flower Pokemon — a plant creature with a yellow bud-like head on a flexible vine stem with two broad leaf appendages
description: A Japanese-print Battle Styles card with watercolor-style illustration art. Bellsprout stands in a lush forest clearing, its vine-like body slightly swaying. The yellow bell-shaped bud head is open at the top with a small droplet, and the figure has two broad green leaf arms extending outward. Blue-purple wildflowers dot the ground in the foreground. Tall tree trunks and a bright woodland canopy recede into the background. The palette is soft and painterly — greens, warm yellows, and dappled light. The mood is gentle and natural.
foreground: Bellsprout standing among blue wildflowers on forest floor
background: tall forest trees, woodland canopy with dappled light
emotion: upright and neutral, a gentle small creature at rest in its habitat
